title: The Missing Entry
description: Mixing, selling, and debunking records all point toward a single pair. Deduce what potion they produce.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing7, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing7=R+ (ing7 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing1=G+ (ing1 G?: (sign undetermined)), ing7=G- (ing7 G?: (sign undetermined))
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing1=B+ (ing1 has B+), ing7=B+ (ing7 has B+)
      → SAME sign + → B+ resolves.
